## What changed? / 改了什么？

<!-- Briefly describe the change and why it is needed. / 简单说明改动和原因。 -->

## How was it verified? / 如何验证？

<!-- Tests, screenshots, recording, or redacted logs are all welcome. / 可以提供测试、截图、录屏或脱敏日志。 -->

## Checklist / 检查

- [ ] I did not include credentials, personal data, internal documents, or unlicensed assets. / 未包含凭证、个人数据、内部文档或未授权资产。
- [ ] I updated relevant tests or documentation when needed. / 如改动影响行为，已按需要更新测试或文档。
